title: libpod: Validate that log tag requires journald driver
body:
Currently validation that log tag requires journald driver is done in several places and emits only warning. Making it an error and moving to `(c *Container) validate()` is a more correct approach.

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
Using log options (`--log-opt tag=mytag`) together with non-journald driver now emits an error.
```
